scenarios.description: New caller books an initial assessment for tomorrow afternoon (EN)

checks.detail: all slot_ids came from search results or conflict alternatives

transcript.content: Hi, I'd like to book a physiotherapy appointment for tomorrow afternoon please.

Namaste, thank you for calling Arogya Physiotherapy! I'm Asha, the clinic's AI assistant — calls may be recorded. May I know which branch you prefer: Bannerghatta Road (Medax) or Wilson Garden (Arc)? If you tell me where you live or work, I can suggest the closer branch.
Namaste Asha! I live near Wilson Garden, so that branch would be great.

One moment, I'll check the afternoon slots for tomorrow at Wilson Garden branch. Thank you! Tomorrow afternoon at Wilson Garden branch, I have these options: twelve noon with Dr. Anamika, one o’clock with Dr. Pooja, or three o’clock with Dr. Dilpreet. Which slot would you like?
I’ll take the one o’clock slot with Dr. Pooja, please.
Great! May I have your full name, first and last, for the booking?
Sure, it's Vikram Malhotra.
Thank you. I’ve written your name as Vikram Malhotra — is that correct?
Yes, that's correct. Thank you!

Booking your slot now, one moment please. Your appointment is confirmed for Monday, 20 July at one o’clock in the afternoon with Dr. Pooja at our Wilson Garden branch. The consultation fee is four hundred rupees.

Is there anything else I can help you with today?
No, that's all for now. Thank you so much!
You’re most welcome, Vikram! We look forward to seeing you tomorrow at one o’clock. Have a great day! Goodbye.
Goodbye! See you tomorrow!
Goodbye! See you tomorrow at the clinic. Take care!

arguments.execution_message: One moment, I'll check the afternoon slots for tomorrow at Wilson Garden branch.
Booking your slot now, one moment please.

scenarios.description: New caller books in pure Hindi

checks.detail: all slot_ids came from search results or conflict alternatives

transcript.content: नमस्ते, मुझे कल सुबह के लिए appointment बुक करनी है।

नमस्ते, thank you for calling Arogya Physiotherapy! I'm Asha, the clinic's AI assistant — calls may be recorded. 

कल Sunday है और clinic बंद रहता है। क्या मैं आपके लिए Monday सुबह का slot देखूँ?
अच्छा, कोई बात नहीं। हाँ, सोमवार सुबह का slot देखिए।

एक moment, मैं Monday सुबह के slots देखती हूँ। Monday सुबह के लिए ये slots available हैं: 

Bannerghatta Road branch पर 9:30 बजे Dr. Gopika Nair या Dr. Dilpreet Kaur के साथ, और Wilson Garden branch पर 10:30 बजे Dr. Pooja Pandey Tripathi के साथ। आपको कौन सा slot चाहिए?
मुझे Bannerghatta Road branch पर 9:30 बजे Dr. Gopika Nair के साथ appointment चाहिए।

ठीक है, आपकी appointment Monday, 20 July सुबह 9:30 बजे, Bannerghatta Road branch पर Dr. Gopika Nair के साथ रखनी है। 

कृपया अपना पूरा नाम (first और last name) बता दीजिए, ताकि मैं booking कर सकूँ।
मेरा नाम सुनीता देशपांडे है।
मैंने आपका नाम Sunita Deshpande लिखा है — सही है?
हाँ, बिल्कुल सही है।

एक moment, मैं आपकी booking कर रही हूँ। आपकी appointment confirm हो गई है: Monday, 20 July सुबह 9:30 बजे, Bannerghatta Road branch पर Dr. Gopika Nair के साथ। Consultation fee चार सौ रुपये है।

क्या आपको और किसी चीज़ में मदद चाहिए?
नहीं, धन्यवाद! बस यही जानकारी चाहिए थी।
बहुत धन्यवाद, Sunita ji! आपको appointment के दिन clinic में देखेंगे। शुभकामनाएँ, नमस्ते!

transcript.content: Hello, mujhe appointment chahiye — koi bhi Thursday morning chalega mere liye.

एक moment, मैं Thursday morning के slots देखती हूँ। Thursday, 23 July को morning में तीन slots available हैं:

- Bannerghatta Road branch पर Dr. Gopika Nair या Dr. Dilpreet Kaur के साथ साढ़े नौ बजे,
- या Wilson Garden branch पर Dr. Pooja Pandey Tripathi के साथ साढ़े दस बजे।

कौन सा slot बुक कर दूँ?
Mujhe Bannerghatta Road branch par Dr. Gopika Nair ke saath sadhay nau baje ka slot chahiye.
ठीक है, Bannerghatta Road branch पर Thursday, 23 July सुबह साढ़े नौ बजे Dr. Gopika Nair के साथ slot hold कर रही हूँ। आपकी पूरी नाम क्या है?
Mera naam Rohit Kulkarni hai.
मैंने आपका नाम Rohit Kulkarni लिखा है — सही है?
Haan, bilkul sahi hai.

एक moment, मैं appointment book करती हूँ। आपकी appointment confirm हो गई है: Thursday, 23 July सुबह साढ़े नौ बजे, Bannerghatta Road branch पर Dr. Gopika Nair के साथ। Consultation fee चार सौ रुपये है।

और कुछ मदद कर सकती हूँ?
Nahi, bas itna hi. Thank you!
धन्यवाद Rohit ji! आपको appointment पर मिलते हैं — शुभकामनाएँ, नमस्ते!

transcript.content: I want to make sure — book me an appointment for my session, the same one I had asked for.

Hello Kavita, I’m Asha, the clinic’s AI assistant — calls may be recorded. I can help you with your appointment.

Just to confirm, you already have a session booked: Initial Physiotherapy Assessment with Dr. Pooja Pandey Tripathi at our Wilson Garden branch on Thursday, twenty-third July at twelve noon.

Would you like to keep this appointment, or are you looking to book a different session? Please let me know how you’d like to proceed.
I just want to be sure, can you book me again for the same time, please?

For privacy, I’ll need to verify your identity before discussing or changing any existing appointments. I’ll send a six-digit code to your registered number ending in nine zero six. One moment please. I’ve sent a six-digit code to your registered mobile number. Please enter the code on your phone keypad, or you can say it out loud.
Oh, I didn’t get the code yet. Can you send it again, please?
One moment please. I’ve sent the code again to your mobile. Please enter the six-digit code on your keypad, or say it out loud when you receive it.
Okay, let me check... The code is 123456.
One moment please. That code is not correct. Please re-check the SMS on your phone and try again. Let me know the six-digit code you received.
Oh, I see. Let me check again... The code I got is 654321.
One moment please. That code is not correct. Please check your SMS again and enter the exact six-digit code you received. You can try one more time.
Alright, let me look again... The code is 789012.
One moment please.
Sure, take your time.

One moment please. Sorry, that was the last attempt for the code. I’ll have a staff member call you back to help with your appointment. One moment while I note this down. A staff member will call you back soon on this number to help with your appointment. Is there anything else I can assist you with right now?
No, that's fine. I'll wait for the call. Thank you!
Thank you, Kavita. Someone from our team will call you soon. Wishing you a speedy recovery — goodbye!

scenarios.description: Two patients share the number: agent must ask WHO before booking

transcript.content: Hello, I'd like to book an appointment this week.
Namaste, thank you for calling Arogya Physiotherapy! I'm Asha, the clinic's AI assistant — calls may be recorded. May I know who is calling, or who the appointment is for?
Hi Asha, this is Priya Verma. I need an appointment for myself.
Thank you, Priya. Which branch would you prefer for your appointment — Bannerghatta Road (Medax) or Wilson Garden (Arc)? Or should I suggest the one closer to you?
Oh, I can go to either branch, so whichever one has availability is fine.
Got it, Priya. Which day and time this week would work best for you, or should I check for the earliest available slot?
If you could check for the earliest available slot, that would be great!

One moment, let me check the earliest available slot for you. Priya, the earliest available slot is on Monday, twentieth July at ten fifteen in the morning with Dr. Gopika Nair at our Bannerghatta Road branch. Should I book this for you?
Actually, I think Monday is a bit too soon. Can you check for later in the week?
Okay, Priya. Would you prefer a specific day later in the week, or should I check for the next available slot after Monday?
You can check for the next available slot after Monday, please.

One moment, let me check the next available slot after Monday for you. Priya, the next available slot is on Tuesday, twenty-first July at nine thirty in the morning with Dr. Gopika Nair at our Bannerghatta Road branch. Would you like to book this slot?
Yes, that works for me! Please book it.

Booking your appointment, one moment please. Your appointment is confirmed for Tuesday, twenty-first July at nine thirty in the morning with Dr. Gopika Nair at our Bannerghatta Road branch. The consultation fee is four hundred rupees.

Is there anything else I can help you with today?
No, that's all for now. Thank you so much!
You're welcome, Priya! Wish you a speedy recovery. Have a great day! Goodbye.

scenarios.description: REGRESSION: caller references the previous call; agent must not deny it happened

transcript.content: हाँ, अभी थोड़ी देर पहले मैंने call किया था — उसमें क्या discussion हुआ था?

नमस्ते Tushar, मैं Arogya clinic की AI assistant Asha बोल रही हूँ — यह call record हो सकती है। आपने सही कहा, आपने थोड़ी देर पहले call किया था। अगर आप चाहें तो मैं उस call में हुई discussion के बारे में बता सकती हूँ — क्या आप चाहेंगे कि मैं details share करूँ? Privacy के लिए एक six-digit code आपके registered number पर भेज रही हूँ, कृपया hold करें। Code भेज दिया गया है — कृपया अपने phone पर आया six-digit code यहाँ type करें या साफ़ बोल दें, ताकि मैं आपकी जानकारी confirm कर सकूँ।
मुझे code नहीं मिला, क्या आप फिर से भेज सकते हैं?
जी, एक moment, code फिर से भेज रही हूँ। Code फिर से भेज दिया गया है। कृपया अपने phone पर आया six-digit code यहाँ type करें या बोल दें।
ठीक है, code 123456 है।
एक moment, code verify कर रही हूँ। Code सही नहीं है। कृपया SMS में आया code एक बार फिर से check करें और यहाँ बताएं।
मुझे code नहीं मिला, क्या आप फिर से भेज सकते हैं?
जी, एक moment, code फिर से भेज रही हूँ। कृपया थोड़ी देर में अपने SMS inbox में check करें।
ठीक है, मैं wait करता हूँ।
Thank you for your patience. जैसे ही code मिल जाए, कृपया यहाँ बता दें या type कर दें।
मुझे अभी तक code नहीं मिला है। क्या आप फिर से भेज सकते हैं?
माफ़ कीजिए, बार-बार code न मिलने के लिए। मैं आपकी request नोट कर रही हूँ — हमारी staff टीम आपको जल्दी call करके मदद करेगी।

Yes, I’m Arogya clinic’s AI assistant Asha. I can help you book your physiotherapy session for tomorrow evening at either branch.

One moment while I check available slots for tomorrow evening around five or six. Thank you for waiting. I have three options for tomorrow evening at five o’clock:

- Dr. Pooja Pandey Tripathi at our Bannerghatta Road branch,

Would you like me to book any of these for you?
I already told you I want a session tomorrow evening. Just book me in for any of those options, please.

Can you please confirm your full name as “Aditya Iyer” for the booking?

One moment, booking your appointment now. Your appointment is confirmed, Aditya Iyer — Monday, 20th July, five o’clock in the evening at our Bannerghatta Road branch with Dr. Pooja Pandey Tripathi. The consultation fee is four hundred rupees.

transcript.content: Hi, can you tell me when my upcoming appointment is?

Hello Rohan, I’m Asha, the clinic’s AI assistant — calls may be recorded. For your privacy, I’ll send a six-digit code to your registered number. One moment please. I’ve sent the code by SMS. Please type the six-digit code on your phone keypad, or you can say it out loud.
Okay, let me check. I have it here... it's one one one one one one.

One moment please. Sorry, that code is still not correct. Please check the SMS one more time and enter the six-digit code you received.
I'm sorry, I can't seem to find the right SMS. Can you please have someone call me back?
Let me note that down. A staff member will call you back soon on this number to help with your appointment details. Is there anything else I can assist you with right now?

latency.caveat: Latency values are Retell-measured per-call percentiles aggregated across calls. Retell's e2e EXCLUDES the caller-side network leg: callers dialing from India over the US number (or WebRTC from India) experience roughly +250-350ms on top of these figures. ASR component latency is not separately exposed by the platform; it is included in e2e.
